\n\nThey start running, shoving past you and each other before dashing into the tunnel.
\n\n“Cowards!” the priestess shouts after them, snarling like a feral beast. The males don’t so much as look over their shoulders, but disappear into the ice with their tails between their legs.
\n\nShe grunts
and stamps her staff on the ice
, returning her attention fully to you. “Fine! Then it’s just you and me, as it should be. I’ll show you the might of the spirits all on my own!”
\n\nThe priestess bears her fangs
and swings her staff around
, levelling the glowing green tip at your [pc.chest].\n\n
